title: Harpy Express: Jester Role
description: Role add-on for The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express
body:
**Addon for https://modrinth.com/mod/harpy-express-mod**

The Jester

Act suspicious to get eliminated by a vigilante

The Jester's objective in a match is to get killed by the innocents, usually by getting a Vigilante to be suspicious of you. This is your only win condition.

To help you act suspicious, the Jester is given a few tools.

  • Jester Instinct: Use the Killer Instinct keybind to see dead bodies through walls.
  • Silly Goofy Mood: Your mood level doesnt cause hallucinations or hide bodies.
  • Lockpick: You're given a lockpick to open any door, however this drains your mood. If your mood is too low, you will no longer be able to pick locks until you complete a task.
